zh.Waldegrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne de Waldegrave於1429年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Sir William Waldegrave29歲，母親Joane de Durward29歲。她於大約1443年與Thomas Bedingfield在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年5月2日在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne de Waldegrave于1429年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir William Waldegrave29岁，母亲Joane de Durward29岁。她于大约1443年与Thomas Bedingfield在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年5月2日在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年25岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne de Waldegrave was born in 1429, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir William Waldegrave, was 29 and her mother, Joane de Durward, was 29. She married Thomas Bedingfield about 1443, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 May 1454, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne de Waldegrave est née en 1429, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Waldegrave, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joane de Durward, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bedingfield environ 1443, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1454, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne de Waldegrave 1429 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Waldegrave 29 und ihre Mutter Joane de Durward 29. Sie hat um 1443 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bedingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1454 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne de Waldegrave è nata il nel 1429 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Waldegrave, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joane de Durward, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bedingfield circa 1443, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1454, nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Waldegrave, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne de Waldegraveが1429年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Waldegraveは29歳，母Joane de Durwardは29歳であった。約1443年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでThomas Bedingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年5月2日にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで25歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne de Waldegrave(이)가 1429년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Waldegrave(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Durward(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Thomas Bedingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 5월 2일 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Swaffham, Norfolk, England: Swaffham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Bedingfield, Suffolk, England: Bedingfield, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne de Waldegrave nasceu em 1429, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Waldegrave, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Durward, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bedingfield aproximadamente 1443, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1454, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne de Waldegrave родилась в 1429 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Waldegrave было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Durward, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bedingfield около 1443 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1454 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne de Waldegrave nació en 1429, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Waldegrave, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joane de Durward, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Bedingfield aproximadamente 1443, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1454, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
